author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
content: Agent implemented self-contained QR eigenvalue solver in roots.rs instead of depending on ferrum-linalg::eigvals. This avoids the cross-crate dependency timing issue (linalg still being built). The polynomial Cargo.toml still lists ferrum-linalg as a dependency but it's only used transitively — roots.rs is self-contained.
